summary: Sidecar has no automatic restart — crash = full app restart required
details: {"id": "DESKTOP-SMELL-003", "severity": "high", "description": "The sidecar/server process spawned via utilityProcess.fork has no automatic restart mechanism. If it crashes mid-session, the main process does not attempt to respawn it. The only recovery path is app.relaunch() + app.exit(0). No watcher, no auto-reconnect, no retry logic."}
